title: RCX Registry — Project Publish v1.0
description: Publishable descriptor of a Crux Daemon project. Captures planning target + allowed-passport ids + working-tenant categories, but NOT individual work items (those stay private to the source daemon). Lets other agents/orgs subscribe to a project's passport set and discover what kind of work is happening there.

publisher_passport.description: Daemon-root passport that signed the publish event (BLAKE3 fingerprint, p_<32 hex>).

project_id.description: Operator-chosen slug. Combined with publisher_passport this yields a globally unique project identifier.

name.description: Human-readable project name. May contain spaces.

planning_target.description: Where planning artifacts live. Either `tenant://<tenant_id>` (a Crux tenant on the source daemon) or `github://<owner>/<repo>`. Null = no planning target yet.

default_passport_fpr.description: Fingerprint of the project's default passport. Resolves the chain when sessions don't supply an explicit passport.

allowed_passport_fprs.description: Passports this project allows acting on its behalf. Other agents can subscribe by establishing a sponsor lineage to one of these.

working_tenant_categories.description: Distinct tenant categories (personal/work/public) used by this project's working tenants. Lets discovery surface 'projects that operate publicly' vs. 'projects with private posture'.

linked_github_repos.description: GitHub repositories the project is indexing as shared memory (owner/repo). Empty when GitHub isn't connected on the source daemon.

created_at.description: When the project was first created on the source daemon (RFC 3339).

signature.description: Ed25519 signature over the canonical CBOR encoding of all preceding fields (project_hash). Hex-encoded.

signer_kid.description: Key id of the signer — for project-publish, equals publisher_passport.

project_hash.description: BLAKE3 hash of the canonical CBOR encoding (32 bytes → 64 hex chars).
